---
description: Final checklist before submitting or presenting the prototype
---

# Ship check

Review the project for presentation readiness:

1. Verify README.md has clear setup instructions
2. Confirm the prototype runs by opening index.html (or equivalent entry point)
3. Check that all strategy files are filled in (no placeholders)
4. Verify pitch/NARRATIVE.md, pitch/DEMO_SCRIPT.md, and pitch/ANTICIPATED_QUESTIONS.md are complete
5. Ensure docs/ARCHITECTURE.md matches the actual code in src/
6. Look for any console errors, broken links, or missing assets

Report a go/no-go decision with specific items to fix if no-go.
